prompt: I want to draft an outline for a migration guide. We're planning a major backend refactor and I need to communicate this to the team. Can you help me create a high-level outline that covers the why, the phases, and what teams need to do?

assertions.name: Has markdown headers
assertions.description: Output uses markdown headers (# or ##) to structure sections

assertions.name: Contains required sections
assertions.description: Output includes sections for: why (motivation), phases/timeline, and team impact

assertions.name: Uses bullets or lists
assertions.description: Uses bullet points or numbered lists to make content scannable

assertions.name: Concise and high-level
assertions.description: Content is brief with short sentences, suitable for 1-pager expansion
